description_long: This object depicts a row of stylized bungalows with steeply pitched, ornate roofs and a whimsical, storybook appearance. The buildings are arranged side by side on a rectangular plot, bordered by a paved sidewalk and a grassy area. The facades feature a variety of rooflines, chimneys, and gables, with some houses having small porches or entryways. A large leafy tree and some shrubbery are present at one end, adding greenery and visual interest to the scene. The color palette is dominated by warm brown tones for the buildings and muted greens for the landscaping. The overall design suggests a quaint, residential neighborhood with a touch of fantasy or historical charm.
description: A row of whimsical, brown-roofed bungalows with ornate gables and a tree-lined sidewalk, set on a rectangular plot with grassy and paved areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed facades, ornate roofs, and the sidewalk with a tree and shrubs on the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the bungalows, the tree at the front, and the linear arrangement along the sidewalk.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back sides of the bungalows, grassy yard, and less architectural detail compared to the front.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the end bungalow, the tree, and the alignment of the houses along the plot.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with varied window groupings on the front facades
